content_en:
Fresh eggs are better than old eggs, and the best kind of eggs is chicken eggs. The eggs are mild but incline slightly towards being cold.

The author of the Qonoon said, "The yolk is hot and wet and makes the blood sanitary, but is not

——— The Prophetic Medicine

nutritious. It is In addition digested quickly when it is still soft." Another person said, "Egg yolk relives the pain, polishes the throat and the trachea, helps the throat and relieves coughing and the ulcers of the lungs, liver and prostate, It In addition eliminates coarseness, especially when blended with the grease of sweet almonds. It In addition maturates and softens whatever is in the chest and softens the roughness of the throat."

When the albumen is used as an eye drop, it cools the hot tumors in the eye and relieves the pain. When it is used as an ointment and placed on the face, it prevents sunburn. In addition, when the albumen is used as an ointment and placed on the forehead, it helps in cases of dysentery.

The author of the Qonoon mentioned eggs in the medicines and remedies of the heart. He In addition said, "Its yolk has a strong effect in strengthening the heart. Egg yolk has three beneficial uses: it turns into blood quickly, it does not produce extensive wastes, and the ‘blood that it produces is light and similar to the blood that feeds the heart. Further, the egg yolk is the most adequate ‘substance against the diseases that affect the essence of the soul."

Abu Dawood narrated in his Sunon that 'A'esha 368

was asked about Basal and she said, "The last mea that the Prophet b had included onions in it."

In the Sahihain it is In addition narrated that the Prophet sg disallowed those who eat onions from entering the mosque.

The Basal is hot in the third degree and has an excess wetness, helps against pollution and prevents hot wind (meaning in the stomach). It In addition excites the sexual drive, strengthens the stomach, helps semen production, makes the color lighter, dissolves the phiegm and cleanses the stomach.

Onion grains help against vitiate (lack of pigment in certain areas of the skin) and are used as an ointment around the area affected by alopecia (A skin disease characterized by loss of hair, partial or total). Further, warts will dissipate effectively when onions are blended with salt (and used as an ointment on the warts). When someone feels nauseous after taking a laxative, smelling onions will help against vomiting. In addition, the onion will dissipate the smell of laxatives, and when onion water (extract) is administered through the nose, it will clear the head. Used as ear drops, onion extract In addition helps against weak hearing, Tinnitus, pus and water that accumulates in the ear. In addition, onion grains are used as an eyeliner, to dry out the water that attacks the eye, i.e. cataracts, when the grains are blended

—— The Prophetic Medicine

Cooked onions are nutritious and help against icterus, jaundice, coughing and roughness in the chest. It is In addition diuretic and relaxes the bowels. It In addition heals dog bites when its water (extract) is blended with salt and rue and squeezed on the affected area. Finally, it will open the orifices of the hemorrhoids when used as suppository.

Onions cause migraines, headaches, flatulence and bring darkness to the sight.

Eating onions in excessive amounts or regularly causes forgetfulness, affects the mind and changes the odor of the mouth and the taste of food. It In addition bothers those in your presence and the angels. Cooking onions dissipates these side effects of the onion. The Sunan narrated:

"The Prophet ordered those who eat onion and garlic to kill them (make them milder) by cooking."

In addition, chewing rue leaves dissipates the odor of the onions.

There is a fake Hadith that states that eggplant

materializes the goals anticipated from eating it. This statement is not suitable to be related from a sane person let alone the Prophet sB.

There are two types of eggplants: white and black. There is a difference of opinion on if it is hot or cold, although we think it is hot. Eggplants cause black bile, piles, clogs, cancer and leprosy. Eggplants In addition spoil ones color, make it black and cause bad breath. White eggplants do not have these side effects.

The Letter Taa L Tamr (Dried Dates) In the Sahih it is narrated that the Prophet b said:

"Whoever ote seven dates in the morning from the area of ‘Aaliyah will not be harmed by poison or magic the rest of that day."

He In addition said:

"The people of a house where there are no dates are hungry."

In addition, the Prophet icterus ate dried dates with butter, with bread and alone. Tamr is hot in the second degree and either wet or dry in the second degree.

-——— The Prophetic Medicine

Dried dates strengthen the liver, relax the bowels, increase semen production, especially when taken with pine, and relieve soar throat. As for those who are not used to eating dried dates, such as the residents of cold areas, dried dates cause them clogs, harm the teeth and cause headaches, unless they are eaten with almonds and

Dried dates are among the most nutritious fruits, their essence is hot and wet. In addition, when one eats dates in the beginning of the day, they help kill worms. Although dried dates are hot, yet they have the strength of an antidote against worms, killing or at least decreasing their numbers, especially when dried dates are taken frequently on an empty stomach. Dried dates are a fruit, a type of food, a cure, a drink and a sweet.

The Sunnah does not mention figs because they did not grow in that area of the Hijaz or Al-Medina. Figs require an environment that is different from that in the areas where dates grow. Allah has sworn by the Tin in His Book because of its tremendous benefits and uses,

Tin is hot and either dry or wet. The best type of figs are the white kind when they are ripe, as they cleanse the sand that accumulates in the liver and prostate and serve as a preventive substance against poisons. Figs are

more nutritious than all other type of fruit, and help relieve the roughness in the chest, throat and trachea. It In addition cleanses the liver and the spleen, purifies the phlegm that accumulates in the stomach and provides good nourishment for the body. Yet, it makes one more susceptible to lice if eaten excessively.

3. Tharid (Meat and Bread Dish)

In the Sahihain it states that the Messenger of Allah b said:

"The virtue of 'A'esha as compared to other women, is like the virtue of Tharid as compared to the rest of the foods."

Tharid is composed of some bread, which is the best food, and meat, which is the best flavoring. When these two are combined together, no other food can surpass them.

There are conflicting opinions regarding which is better, the bread or the meat. The correct opinion is that bread is used more while meat is better and superior to bread. In addition, the meat resembles the true essence of the human body more than any other food. It is In addition the food of the people of Paradise. Allah said about those who sought to eat herbs, cucumbers, Fum (wheat or garlic), lentils and onions,

—— The Prophetic Medicine 3 sl (19) {BE 5a 5a GST ga sail Sct p

"Would you exchange that which is better for that

Many among the scholars said that Fum is wheat. Hence this Ayah states that meat (quails) is better than wheat. Allah has the best knowledge.

L jummar (Palm Pith)

In the Sahihain it is narrated that 'Abdullah bin Umar said." "While we were sitting with the Messenger of Allah b he was brought a jummar of a date tree. The Prophet b said:

'There is a tree that resembles the Muslim as its leaves never fall."

jummar is cold and dry in the first degree, and it seals the ulcers and relieves hemorrhage, diarrhea, yellow bile and blood pressure. In addition, the jummar is not harmful, but is not nutritious and is difficult to digest. The jummar is all benefit and this is why the Prophet said it resembled the Muslim, because of his tremendous usefulness and goodness.

The Prophetic Medicine 2. Gubn (Cheese)

In the Sunan of Abu Dawood it is narrated that Abdullah bin 'Umar said that the Prophet ai. was brought some cheese while in the area of Tabuk and that he asked for a knife, mentioned Allah's Name and then cut it. In addition, the Companions used to eat cheese in Iraq and Sham (Greater Syria) areas. Unsalted cheese is good for the stomach, easy on the body organs, produces flesh and relaxes the stomach. Salted cheese, on other hand, is less nutritious and is bad for the stomach and the intestines. Old and grilled cheese heats the stomach and is beneficial in cases of ulcers and diarrhea.

Cheese is cold and wet and is better when it is grilled because the fire makes it milder, softer and better tasting and scented. The old salted cheese is hot and dry, and boiling In addition makes it softer and less sour because the fire extracts the hot residue from the cheese. Salted cheese makes the body weak and causes stones in the liver and prostate. It is In addition bad for the stomach, and mixing it with what people think will make it milder is even worse because these substances allow the cheese an easy access to the stomach.

——— The Prophetic Medicine

Lhe Letter Haa i.Henna

We mentioned the benefits of henna’ before and mentioned the Ahadeeth on this subject.

2. Habbah Sawdaa (The Black Seed)

In the Sahihain it is narrated that Abu Hurayrah related from the Prophet “ that he said:

"Use the Black Seed, because it contains a cure for every type of ailment, except for death." [At-Termezey, Ahmad and Ibn Hibban].

The Black Seed (or Habbat AI-Barakah) is called Shuneiz in Persian, black cumin and Indian cumin. AIHarbi narrated that AI-Hasan said, "It is the mustard seed" while Al-Harawi said that it is the green seed which is the seed of the terebinth. These are not correct opinions, because the Prophet b stated that it is the Black Seed, which is the Shuneiz as we stated.

The Black Seed has many benefits, as indicated by the Prophet's statement:

"It is a cure for every type of disease." This statement is just like what Allah said:
content_id:
Telur segar lebih baik dari telur lama, dan jenis telur terbaik adalah telur ayam. Telur bersifat lembut namun sedikit condong ke arah dingin.

Penulis Qonoon berkata, "Kuning telur bersifat panas dan basah serta menyehatkan darah, namun tidak

——— Pengobatan Nabawi

bergizi. Selain itu mudah dicerna ketika masih lunak." Orang lain berkata, "Kuning telur meredakan rasa sakit, memperhalus tenggorokan dan trakea, membantu tenggorokan dan meredakan batuk serta bisul pada paru-paru, hati dan prostat. Selain itu juga menghilangkan kekasaran, terutama bila dicampur dengan lemak almond manis. Selain itu juga mematangkan dan melembutkan apa yang ada di dada serta melembutkan kekasaran tenggorokan."

Ketika putih telur digunakan sebagai tetes mata, ia mendinginkan tumor panas pada mata dan meredakan rasa sakit. Ketika digunakan sebagai salep dan dioleskan pada wajah, ia mencegah kulit terbakar sinar matahari. Selain itu, ketika putih telur digunakan sebagai salep dan dioleskan pada dahi, ia membantu dalam kasus disentri.

Penulis Qonoon menyebutkan telur dalam obat-obatan dan pengobatan untuk jantung. Beliau juga berkata, "Kuning telur memiliki efek kuat dalam menguatkan jantung. Kuning telur memiliki tiga manfaat: ia cepat berubah menjadi darah, tidak menghasilkan banyak sisa, dan darah yang dihasilkannya ringan serta serupa dengan darah yang memberi nutrisi pada jantung. Lebih jauh, kuning telur adalah zat yang paling memadai untuk melawan penyakit yang mempengaruhi esensi jiwa."

Abu Dawood meriwayatkan dalam Sunannya bahwa 'A'esha 368

ditanya tentang Basal dan ia berkata, "Makanan terakhir yang dimakan Nabi ﷺ mengandung bawang di dalamnya."

Dalam Shahihain juga diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ melarang mereka yang memakan bawang untuk memasuki masjid.

Basal bersifat panas pada tingkat ketiga dan memiliki kelebihan kelembaban, membantu melawan polutan dan mencegah angin panas (yakni di perut). Selain itu juga merangsang dorongan seksual, menguatkan lambung, membantu produksi sperma, membuat warna kulit lebih cerah, melarutkan dahak dan membersihkan perut.

Biji bawang membantu melawan vitiligo (kekurangan pigmen pada area tertentu kulit) dan digunakan sebagai salep di sekitar area yang terkena alopesia (penyakit kulit yang ditandai dengan kerontokan rambut, sebagian atau total). Selain itu, kutil akan hilang secara efektif ketika bawang dicampur dengan garam (dan digunakan sebagai salep pada kutil). Ketika seseorang merasa mual setelah mengonsumsi pencahar, mencium bawang akan membantu mencegah muntah. Selain itu, bawang akan menghilangkan bau pencahar, dan ketika air bawang (ekstrak) diteteskan melalui hidung, ia akan membersihkan kepala. Digunakan sebagai tetes telinga, ekstrak bawang juga membantu mengatasi pendengaran lemah, tinitus, nanah dan air yang menumpuk di telinga. Selain itu, biji bawang digunakan sebagai celak mata, untuk mengeringkan air yang menyerang mata, yaitu katarak, ketika biji dicampur

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

Bawang yang dimasak bergizi dan membantu melawan ikterus, penyakit kuning, batuk dan kekasaran di dada. Selain itu juga bersifat diuretik dan mengendurkan usus. Selain itu juga menyembuhkan gigitan anjing ketika airnya (ekstrak) dicampur dengan garam dan rue lalu diperas pada area yang terkena. Akhirnya, ia akan membuka orifis ambeien ketika digunakan sebagai supositoria.

Bawang menyebabkan migrain, sakit kepala, kembung dan mengaburkan penglihatan.

Memakan bawang secara berlebihan atau teratur menyebabkan kelupaan, mempengaruhi pikiran dan mengubah bau mulut serta rasa makanan. Selain itu juga mengganggu orang-orang di sekitar Anda dan para malaikat. Memasak bawang menghilangkan efek samping ini. Sunan meriwayatkan:

"Nabi memerintahkan mereka yang memakan bawang dan bawang putih untuk mematikannya (membuatnya lebih lembut) dengan memasaknya."

Selain itu, mengunyah daun rue menghilangkan bau bawang.

Ada hadith palsu yang menyatakan bahwa terong

mewujudkan tujuan yang diharapkan dari memakannya. Pernyataan ini tidak pantas untuk dinisbatkan kepada orang waras apalagi kepada Nabi ﷺ.

Ada dua jenis terong: putih dan hitam. Terdapat perbedaan pendapat mengenai apakah ia bersifat panas atau dingin, meskipun menurut kami ia bersifat panas. Terong menyebabkan empedu hitam, ambeien, penyumbatan, kanker dan lepra. Terong juga merusak warna kulit, membuatnya menghitam dan menyebabkan bau mulut. Terong putih tidak memiliki efek samping ini.

Huruf Taa L Tamr (Kurma Kering) Dalam Shahih diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda:

"Barangsiapa memakan tujuh butir kurma di pagi hari dari daerah 'Aaliyah, ia tidak akan dirugikan oleh racun atau sihir sepanjang hari itu."

Beliau juga bersabda:

"Orang-orang di rumah yang tidak ada kurmanya adalah orang-orang yang lapar."

Selain itu, Nabi ﷺ memakan kurma kering dengan mentega, dengan roti dan sendiri. Tamr bersifat panas pada tingkat kedua dan basah atau kering pada tingkat kedua.

-——— Pengobatan Nabawi

Kurma kering menguatkan hati, mengendurkan usus, meningkatkan produksi sperma terutama bila dikonsumsi bersama pinus, dan meredakan sakit tenggorokan. Bagi mereka yang tidak terbiasa memakan kurma kering, seperti penduduk daerah dingin, kurma kering menyebabkan penyumbatan, merusak gigi dan menyebabkan sakit kepala, kecuali dimakan bersama almond dan

Kurma kering termasuk buah-buahan paling bergizi, esensinya bersifat panas dan basah. Selain itu, ketika seseorang memakan kurma di awal hari, ia membantu membunuh cacing. Meskipun kurma kering bersifat panas, namun memiliki kekuatan sebagai penawar terhadap cacing, membunuh atau setidaknya mengurangi jumlahnya, terutama ketika kurma kering dikonsumsi secara rutin dalam keadaan perut kosong. Kurma kering adalah buah, sejenis makanan, obat, minuman dan manisan.

Sunnah tidak menyebutkan buah tin karena tidak tumbuh di wilayah Hijaz atau Al-Madinah. Buah tin memerlukan lingkungan yang berbeda dari daerah tempat kurma tumbuh. Allah telah bersumpah dengan Tin dalam Kitab-Nya karena manfaat dan kegunaannya yang sangat besar.

Tin bersifat panas dan kering atau basah. Jenis buah tin terbaik adalah yang putih ketika sudah matang, karena membersihkan pasir yang menumpuk di hati dan prostat serta berfungsi sebagai zat pencegah racun. Buah tin adalah

lebih bergizi dari semua jenis buah lainnya, dan membantu meringankan kekasaran di dada, tenggorokan dan trakea. Selain itu juga membersihkan hati dan limpa, memurnikan dahak yang menumpuk di perut dan memberikan nutrisi yang baik bagi tubuh. Namun, ia membuat seseorang lebih rentan terhadap kutu jika dimakan secara berlebihan.

3. Tharid (Hidangan Daging dan Roti)

Dalam Shahihain disebutkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda:

"Keutamaan 'A'esha dibandingkan wanita-wanita lain, seperti keutamaan Tharid dibandingkan makanan-makanan lainnya."

Tharid terdiri dari roti, yang merupakan makanan terbaik, dan daging, yang merupakan lauk terbaik. Ketika keduanya digabungkan, tidak ada makanan lain yang dapat menandinginya.

Terdapat pendapat yang berbeda mengenai mana yang lebih baik, roti atau daging. Pendapat yang benar adalah bahwa roti lebih sering digunakan sementara daging lebih baik dan unggul dari roti. Selain itu, daging lebih menyerupai esensi sejati tubuh manusia dibandingkan makanan lainnya. Selain itu juga merupakan makanan penduduk Surga. Allah berfirman tentang mereka yang berusaha memakan sayuran, mentimun, Fum (gandum atau bawang putih), lentil dan bawang,

—— Pengobatan Nabawi 3 sl (19) {BE 5a 5a GST ga sail Sct p

"Apakah kamu mengambil sesuatu yang rendah sebagai pengganti yang lebih baik?"

Banyak di antara para ulama berkata bahwa Fum adalah gandum. Maka ayat ini menyatakan bahwa daging (puyuh) lebih baik dari gandum. Allah Maha Mengetahui.

L jummar (Empulur Pohon Kurma)

Dalam Shahihain diriwayatkan bahwa 'Abdullah bin Umar berkata: "Ketika kami sedang duduk bersama Rasulullah ﷺ, beliau dibawakan jummar dari pohon kurma. Nabi ﷺ bersabda:

'Ada sebuah pohon yang menyerupai seorang Muslim karena daunnya tidak pernah gugur.'

Jummar bersifat dingin dan kering pada tingkat pertama, dan ia menutup bisul serta meredakan pendarahan, diare, empedu kuning dan tekanan darah. Selain itu, jummar tidak berbahaya, namun tidak bergizi dan sulit dicerna. Jummar seluruhnya bermanfaat dan itulah mengapa Nabi ﷺ mengatakan ia menyerupai seorang Muslim, karena kegunaan dan kebaikannya yang sangat besar.

Pengobatan Nabawi 2. Gubn (Keju)

Dalam Sunan Abu Dawood diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah bin 'Umar berkata bahwa Nabi ﷺ dibawakan sejenis keju ketika berada di daerah Tabuk dan beliau meminta pisau, menyebut nama Allah kemudian memotongnya. Selain itu, para Sahabat biasa memakan keju di daerah Iraq dan Sham (Greater Syria). Keju yang tidak diasinkan baik untuk lambung, mudah bagi organ tubuh, menghasilkan daging dan mengendurkan perut. Keju yang diasinkan, di sisi lain, kurang bergizi dan buruk untuk lambung dan usus. Keju tua dan keju panggang memanaskan perut dan bermanfaat dalam kasus bisul dan diare.

Keju bersifat dingin dan basah, dan lebih baik jika dipanggang karena api membuatnya lebih lembut, lebih lunak, dan lebih enak rasa serta aromanya. Keju tua yang diasinkan bersifat panas dan kering, dan perebusan juga membuatnya lebih lunak dan kurang asam karena api menarik sisa panas dari keju. Keju asin melemahkan tubuh dan menyebabkan batu di hati dan prostat. Keju juga buruk bagi lambung, dan mencampurnya dengan apa yang orang kira akan membuatnya lebih ringan justru lebih buruk lagi karena zat-zat tersebut memudahkan keju masuk ke dalam lambung.

——— Thibbun Nabawi

Huruf Haa 1. Henna

Kami telah menyebutkan manfaat henna sebelumnya dan menyebutkan hadith-hadith mengenai topik ini.

2. Habbah Sawda' (Biji Hitam)

Dalam Shahihain diriwayatkan bahwa Abu Hurayrah meriwayatkan dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda:

"Gunakanlah Biji Hitam, karena di dalamnya terdapat penyembuh untuk setiap jenis penyakit, kecuali kematian." [At-Tirmidzi, Ahmad, dan Ibn Hibban].

Biji Hitam (atau Habbat al-Barakah) disebut Shuneiz dalam bahasa Persia, jintan hitam, dan jintan India. Al-Harbi meriwayatkan bahwa Al-Hasan berkata, "Itu adalah biji sawi," sementara Al-Harawi mengatakan bahwa itu adalah biji hijau yang merupakan biji pohon terpentin. Pendapat-pendapat ini tidak tepat, karena Nabi ﷺ menyatakan bahwa itu adalah Biji Hitam, yaitu Shuneiz sebagaimana yang kami sebutkan.

Biji Hitam memiliki banyak manfaat, sebagaimana ditunjukkan oleh sabda Nabi ﷺ:

"Ia adalah penyembuh untuk setiap jenis penyakit." Pernyataan ini serupa dengan apa yang Allah firmankan:

Dried dates are a fruit, a type of food, a cure, a drink and a sweet.

The السنة النبوية does not mention figs because they did not grow in that area of the Hijaz or Al-Medina. Figs require an environment that is different from that in the areas where dates grow. الله has sworn by the Tin in His Book because of its tremendous benefits and uses,

Tin is hot and either dry or wet. The best type of figs are the white kind when they are ripe, as they cleanse the sand that accumulates in the liver and prostate and serve as a preventive substance against poisons. Figs are

more nutritious than all other type of fruit, and help relieve the roughness in the chest, throat and trachea. It In addition cleanses the liver and the spleen, purifies the phlegm that accumulates in the stomach and provides good nourishment for the body. Yet, it makes one more susceptible to lice if eaten excessively.

3. Tharid (Meat and Bread Dish)

In the Sahihain it states that رسول الله ﷺ b said:

"The virtue of 'A'esha as compared to other women, is like the virtue of Tharid as compared to the rest of the foods."

Tharid is composed of some bread, which is the best food, and meat, which is the best flavoring. When these two are combined together, no other food can surpass them.

There are conflicting opinions regarding which is better, the bread or the meat. The correct opinion is that bread is used more while meat is better and superior to bread. In addition, the meat resembles the true essence of the human body more than any other food. It is In addition the food of the people of Paradise. الله said about those who sought to eat herbs, cucumbers, Fum (wheat or garlic), lentils and onions,

—— The Prophetic Medicine 3 sl (19) {BE 5a 5a GST ga sail Sct p

"Would you exchange that which is better for that

Many among the scholars said that Fum is wheat. Hence this Ayah states that meat (quails) is better than wheat. الله has the best knowledge.

L jummar (Palm Pith)

In the Sahihain it is narrated that 'Abdullah bin Umar said." "While we were sitting with رسول الله ﷺ b he was brought a jummar of a date tree. النبي ﷺ b said:

'There is a tree that resembles the Muslim as its leaves never fall."

jummar is cold and dry in the first degree, and it seals the ulcers and relieves hemorrhage, diarrhea, yellow bile and blood pressure. In addition, the jummar is not harmful, but is not nutritious and is difficult to digest. The jummar is all benefit and this is why النبي ﷺ said it resembled the Muslim, because of his tremendous usefulness and goodness.

The Prophetic Medicine 2. Gubn (Cheese)

In the Sunan of Abu Dawood it is narrated that Abdullah bin 'Umar said that النبي ﷺ ai. was brought some cheese while in the area of Tabuk and that he asked for a knife, mentioned الله's Name and then cut it. In addition, the الصحابة used to eat cheese in Iraq and Sham (Greater Syria) areas. Unsalted cheese is good for the stomach, easy on the body organs, produces flesh and relaxes the stomach. Salted cheese, on other hand, is less nutritious and is bad for the stomach and the intestines. Old and grilled cheese heats the stomach and is beneficial in cases of ulcers and diarrhea.

Cheese is cold and wet and is better when it is grilled because the fire makes it milder, softer and better tasting and scented. The old salted cheese is hot and dry, and boiling In addition makes it softer and less sour because the fire extracts the hot residue from the cheese. Salted cheese makes the body weak and causes stones in the liver and prostate. It is In addition bad for the stomach, and mixing it with what people think will make it milder is even worse because these substances allow the cheese an easy access to the stomach.

——— The Prophetic Medicine

Lhe Letter Haa i.Henna

We mentioned the benefits of henna’ before and mentioned the Ahadeeth on this subject.

2. Habbah Sawdaa (The Black Seed)

In the Sahihain it is narrated that Abu Hurayrah related from النبي ﷺ “ that he said:

"Use the Black Seed, because it contains a cure for every type of ailment, except for death." [At-Termezey, Ahmad and Ibn Hibban].

The Black Seed (or Habbat AI-Barakah) is called Shuneiz in Persian, black cumin and Indian cumin. AIHarbi narrated that AI-Hasan said, "It is the mustard seed" while Al-Harawi said that it is the green seed which is the seed of the terebinth. These are not correct opinions, because النبي ﷺ b stated that it is the Black Seed, which is the Shuneiz as we stated.

The Black Seed has many benefits, as indicated by النبي ﷺ's statement:

"It is a cure for every type of disease." This statement is just like what الله said:
